---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
title-block-style: none
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-banner" style="--hero-image: url('assets/heroes/rally_crowd.jpg');">
  <div class="banner-title">The Map</div>
  <p class="banner-sub">Every rally, every major stop. Ordered chronologically — press <b>Play Journey</b> to fly through.</p>
</div>
```

<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css" crossorigin="" />
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js" crossorigin=""></script>

<div class="trump-map" id="trump-map"></div>

<div style="margin-top: 1rem; font-family: 'Libre Franklin', sans-serif;">
  <button class="read-aloud" id="play-journey">▶ Play Journey</button>
  <span id="journey-caption" class="muted" style="margin-left: 1rem;"></span>
</div>

{{< include includes/trumpmap.html >}}
